chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 772 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 11.10.2022 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General <><><><>..<><><><> Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate, files power on behalf of respondents 4 to 7, which is taken on record. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petitioner would be satisfied and shall not press instant petition, if directions are issued to respondent No.5 to pass order in accordance with law on his application for early retirement, copy whereof is available at Annexure ‘A’ page-13 of the memo of petition. Learned counsel appearing for respondents 4 to 7 while conceding the proposition of the learned counsel for the petitioner states that sixty days’ time may be granted for disposal of the aforementioned application by respondent No.5. Accordingly, in terms of the aforementioned contentions of the learned counsel for the petitioner and undertaking given by learned counsel appearing for respondents 4 to 7, this petition stands disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI
